title: Denied crown buildup claim narrative review (de-identified)
source_text:
De-identified claim packet for review.
Patient label: Patient A (no real name on file in this sample).
Chart label: CHART-A (synthetic).
Claim: CLAIM-1001, status Denied.
Payer: Payer One.
Procedure: Crown buildup, tooth 3.
Date of service: 2026-06-12.
Billed amount: 215.75.
Denial note from payer: Missing supporting attachment.
Clinical note excerpt: Fractured cusp with recurrent decay; documented cold sensitivity.
Accounts receivable export: NOT PROVIDED in this packet.
Prior authorization reference: NOT PROVIDED in this packet.
review_instructions: You are reviewing a dental insurance claim packet for a resubmission narrative. Do not invent any patient identity, dollar amount, date, or clinical fact that is not present in the source text. Respond ONLY with a single JSON object (no markdown fences) using exactly these keys: missing_data (array of strings naming fields that are not provided), citations (array of strings quoting facts you used directly from the source text), contradictions (array of strings; empty if none), invented_facts (array of strings; list any value you could not source, otherwise empty), recommended_action (short string).
